ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS data entry */,
  "log_header" TEXT /* Log header of the NMEA sentence (e.g., $GPVTG) */,
  "track_true_degrees" REAL /* Track made good in degrees True */,
  "track_true_indicator" TEXT /* True track indicator (T) */,
  "track_magnetic_degrees" REAL /* Track made good in degrees Magnetic */,
  "track_magnetic_indicator" TEXT /* Magnetic track indicator (M) */,
  "example_data" TEXT /* Example data string for the NMEA sentence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vessel's position */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vessel's position */,
  "ground_speed_knots" REAL /* Ground speed in knots */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the GPS data (e.g., ship, boat, satellite) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who added or updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel (e.g., ship, boat) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the vessel */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vessel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vessel information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vessel information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource to which the permission applies (e.g., gps_data, vessels) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., full, partial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
